description: Initial execution result for task task2

data.task_objective: Build an interview engine to conduct the interview session, present generated questions, capture candidate responses, and dynamically trigger follow-up questions.
data.context:
Task task0:
  Objective: Implement a module to parse and analyze job descriptions and candidate resumes, producing structured feature data and match indicators.
  Result: ```json
{
  "job_description_analysis": {
    "job_title": "Software Engineer",
    "required_skills": [
      "Python",
      "Data Structures",
      "Algorithms",
      "Object-Oriented Programming",
      "Database Management",
      "Communication",
      "Teamwork"
    ],
    "preferred_skills": [
      "Machine Learning",
      "Cloud Computing (AWS, Azure, GCP)",
      "Agile Methodologies",
      "DevOps"
    ],
    "experience_level": "Mid-Level",
    "education_requirements": "Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field",
    "responsibilities": [
      "Design, develop, and maintain software applications",
      "Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code",
      "Collaborate with cross-functional teams",
      "Participate in code reviews",
      "Troubleshoot and debug issues",
      "Contribute to system architecture and design"
    ]
  },
  "resume_analysis": {
    "candidate_name": "John Doe",
    "skills": [
      "Python",
      "Data Structures",
      "Algorithms",
      "Object-Oriented Programming",
      "SQL",
      "Machine Learning",
      "AWS"
    ],
    "experience": [
      {
        "title": "Software Engineer",
        "company": "ABC Company",
        "dates": "2018-2022",
        "responsibilities": [
          "Developed and maintained Python-based applications",
          "Designed and implemented database schemas",
          "Deployed applications on AWS",
          "Collaborated with team members on projects"
        ]
      },
      {
        "title": "Intern",
        "company": "XYZ Company",
        "dates": "2017",
        "responsibilities": [
          "Assisted in the development of web applications",
          "Wrote unit tests",
          "Participated in code reviews"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "education": {
      "degree": "Bachelor of Science in Computer Science",
      "university": "University of California, Berkeley",
      "graduation_date": "2018"
    }
  },
  "match_indicators": {
    "required_skills_total": 7,
    "required_skills_matched": 5,
    "required_skill_match_ratio": 0.71,
    "preferred_skills_total": 4,
    "preferred_skills_matched": 2,
    "preferred_skill_match_ratio": 0.50,
    "experience_level_match": true,
    "education_match": true,
    "overall_match_score": 0.78,
    "responsibility_keywords_matched": 7
  },
  "extracted_features": {
    "programming_languages": ["Python", "SQL"],
    "data_structures": ["Data Structures"],
    "algorithms": ["Algorithms"],
    "object_oriented_programming": ["Object-Oriented Programming"],
    "databases": ["SQL"],
    "cloud_platforms": ["AWS"],
    "machine_learning": ["Machine Learning"],
    "methodologies": ["Agile (inferred)", "DevOps (inferred)"],
    "soft_skills": ["Communication", "Teamwork"],
    "tools_and_frameworks": []
  }
}
```
Task task1:
  Objective: Create a question generator that produces technical and behavioral interview questions based on the parsed job and resume data.
  Result: ```json
{
  "technical_questions": [
    {
      "question": "Describe your experience with Python. Can you provide an example of a challenging project where you used Python and the specific libraries or frameworks you utilized?",
      "follow_up_questions": [
        "How did you handle performance optimization in that project?",
        "What testing strategies did you employ?",
        "How did you manage dependencies?"
      ],
      "category": "Programming Languages"
    },
    {
      "question": "Explain your understanding of Data Structures and Algorithms. Can you describe a situation where you had to choose a specific data structure or algorithm to optimize performance? What factors influenced your decision?",
      "follow_up_questions": [
        "What was the time complexity of your solution?",
        "How did you validate the performance improvements?",
        "Are there any trade-offs to your chosen approach?"
      ],
      "category": "Data Structures & Algorithms"
    },
    {
      "question": "Discuss your experience with Object-Oriented Programming principles. How have you applied these principles in your previous projects to improve code maintainability and scalability?",
      "follow_up_questions": [
        "Can you give an example of using inheritance or polymorphism?",
        "How do you ensure your classes are loosely coupled?",
        "What design patterns are you familiar with?"
      ],
      "category": "Object-Oriented Programming"
    },
    {
      "question": "Describe your experience with database management, specifically using SQL. Can you walk me through a complex SQL query you've written and explain how you optimized it for performance?",
      "follow_up_questions": [
        "What indexing strategies did you use?",
        "How did you handle large datasets?",
        "What database systems have you worked with?"
      ],
      "category": "Databases"
    },
    {
      "question": "Explain your experience with AWS. Can you describe a project where you utilized AWS services? Which services did you use, and what were the benefits of using AWS in that context?",
      "follow_up_questions": [
        "How did you handle security in your AWS environment?",
        "What strategies did you use for cost optimization?",
        "How did you automate deployment and scaling?"
      ],
      "category": "Cloud Platforms"
    },
    {
      "question": "Describe your experience with Machine Learning. What types of machine learning algorithms have you worked with, and how did you evaluate their performance? Please provide a specific example.",
      "follow_up_questions": [
        "How did you handle data preprocessing?",
        "What metrics did you use to evaluate your model?",
        "How did you address overfitting?"
      ],
      "category": "Machine Learning"
    }
  ],
  "behavioral_questions": [
    {
      "question": "Describe a situation where you had to work in a team to solve a complex problem. What was your role, and how did you contribute to the team's success?",
      "follow_up_questions": [
        "How did you handle disagreements within the team?",
        "What did you learn from the experience?",
        "How did you ensure effective communication?"
      ],
      "category": "Teamwork"
    },
    {
      "question": "Tell me about a time when you had to deal with a tight deadline or unexpected obstacle while working on a project. How did you handle the situation, and what was the outcome?",
      "follow_up_questions": [
        "How did you prioritize tasks?",
        "Did you ask for help? If so, from whom?",
        "What would you do differently next time?"
      ],
      "category": "Problem Solving"
    },
    {
      "question": "Describe a time when you had to explain a technical concept to a non-technical audience. How did you ensure they understood the information?",
      "follow_up_questions": [
        "What strategies did you use to simplify the explanation?",
        "How did you gauge their understanding?",
        "What was the result of the communication?"
      ],
      "category": "Communication"
    },
    {
      "question": "Give an example of a time you took initiative on a project. What motivated you to do so, and what was the result?",
      "follow_up_questions": [
        "How did you identify the need for initiative?",
        "What obstacles did you face?",
        "How did your initiative benefit the project or team?"
      ],
      "category": "Initiative"
    },
    {
       "question": "Tell me about a time you received negative feedback. How did you respond?",
       "follow_up_questions": [
         "How did you process it?",
         "What steps did you take?",
         "What did you learn?"
       ],
       "category": "Feedback"
     }
  ]
}
```
data.next_objective:
Task task3:
  Objective: Develop an answer evaluation component that assesses each candidate response for relevance, depth, confidence, and technical accuracy, outputting evaluation metrics.
Task task6:
  Objective: Assemble the final candidate evaluation report in plain text, combining resume-job match analysis, interview summary, technical and behavioral assessments, strengths/weaknesses, recommendation, and scoring breakdown.
